evals.prompt: I have a first meeting with a regional bank about AI but no discovery notes yet. Help me choose a demo direction.
evals.expected_output: {slug}-ideation.md produced with a clear archetype, target audience assumptions, proposed wow moments, data strategy, and explicit open questions.
assertions: Does not invent confirmed discovery facts
Selects a demo archetype and explains why
Identifies at least 3 open discovery questions
Provides a frozen direction contract usable by weave-script
Marks assumptions clearly so later discovery can validate or replace them

evals.prompt: We have a manufacturing prospect with vague interest in operational AI. No notes yet. Run ideation only.
evals.expected_output: Ideation output frames an operational use case without running discovery parser, platform audit, or build stages.
assertions: Does not proceed to platform audit or script generation
Creates a practical data strategy for synthetic or representative data
Includes wow moments and qualification questions for the first discovery call
